credits.starrailexpress.thank_you:
Thank you for playing StarRail Express Murder Mystery DLC!
The Waning Moon team spent a lot of time adding more features and content to this mod.
We also added many playable maps and new roles.
If you enjoy it and want to make videos or streams, please credit my channel, the video, and the mod page!
Original author - RAT / doctor4t
DLC author - Waning Moon team
This DLC is fully open source and free
game.player.stung: You feel something sting you in your sleep
game.start_error.game_running: Cannot start game: a game is already running. Please try again from the lobby
game.start_error.not_enough_players: Cannot start game: at least 6 players required
game.win.star.killers: Killers reached their kill count and won!
game.win.star.loose_end: They dealt with all remaining trouble!
game.win.star.time: Killers' time ran out: Passengers win!
game.win.star.thief: The thief escaped with the gold! Thief wins!
item.trainmurdermystery.blackout.tooltip:
Turns off all lights on the train for 15–20 seconds
Use your intuition [Left‑Alt] to see your target in the dark
Activates immediately upon purchase, 5‑minute cooldown
item.trainmurdermystery.body_bag.tooltip:
Use on a corpse to bag and remove it
Single use, 5‑minute cooldown
item.trainmurdermystery.crowbar.tooltip: Use on any door to open it permanently
item.trainmurdermystery.derringer.toolti:
Aim, right‑click and fire
Can only fire once, so make it count!
Bullet refills after a kill
item.trainmurdermystery.firecracker.tool:
Place on the ground, explodes after 15 seconds
Can simulate gunfire and lure others
item.trainmurdermystery.grenade.tooltip:
Right‑click to throw, explodes on impact
Good for clearing crowds, watch the blast radius!
Single use, 5‑minute cooldown
item.trainmurdermystery.knife.tooltip:
Hold right‑click and approach your victim
After a kill, 1‑minute cooldown
Attack pushes a player (no cooldown)
item.trainmurdermystery.lockpick.tooltip:
Use on any locked door to open it (no cooldown)
Sneak and use on a door to jam it for 1 minute (3‑minute cooldown)
item.trainmurdermystery.note.tooltip:
Write a message and pin it for others to read
Sneak to write, then place on wall or floor
Invisible while held
item.trainmurdermystery.nunchuck.tooltip:
Left click to knock left, right click to knock right, Shift+left click to knock back
Knockback range 0.5 blocks, attack range 5 blocks
Knocking an enemy to the side then attacking can kill instantly
Three hits within 7 seconds kills
After a kill the nunchuck disappears and drops a revolver, 7‑second cooldown
item.trainmurdermystery.defense_vial.too: Add to food or drink to grant the next taker a shield!
item.trainmurdermystery.poison_vial.tool: Sneakily add to food or drink to poison the next taker
item.trainmurdermystery.psycho_mode.tool:
“Do you enjoy hurting others?”
Hide your identity and swing the bat wildly for 30 seconds
A full swing can kill, and the ability cannot be cancelled while active
Activates immediately upon purchase, 5‑minute cooldown
item.trainmurdermystery.revolver.tooltip:
Aim, right‑click and fire
If you kill a civilian, it drops directly
item.trainmurdermystery.magnum_bullet.to:
Ammunition for sniper rifles
Hold a sniper rifle, left‑click the item in inventory to load.
item.trainmurdermystery.scope.tooltip:
Scope for sniper rifles
Hold a sniper rifle, sneak then left‑click to attach without opening inventory
item.trainmurdermystery.sniper_rifle.too:
Long‑range weapon with 150‑block range
Left‑click to load ammo, sneak then left‑click to attach/detach scope
Crouch right‑click to aim
Right‑click while standing to shoot
item.trainmurdermystery.scorpion.tooltip: Sneakily place in a bed to poison the next sleeper
itemGroup.starrailexpress.compact: Wathe Compatibility: All (please avoid using these items, they may cause crashes)
